# API Design

**Base URL:** `https://farewell.contoso.com/api/v1`  
**Protocol:** HTTPS only (enforced at Azure Front Door)  
**Format:** JSON (`Content-Type: application/json`)  
**Auth:** Session cookie (`__Host-farewell-session`) on all protected routes  
**Versioning:** URI path prefix (`/v1`). Breaking changes increment the version.  
**Spec:** OpenAPI 3.1 (auto-generated by Fastify + `@fastify/swagger`)

---

## Authentication Model

All protected endpoints require a valid server-side session established via the OAuth flow.  
The session cookie is:

```
Set-Cookie: __Host-farewell-session=<opaque-token>; 
  Path=/; 
  Secure; 
  HttpOnly; 
  SameSite=Lax; 
  Max-Age=28800
```

The API resolves the opaque token â†’ session object in Redis â†’ validates expiry â†’ attaches `req.session`.

---

## Endpoints

### Authentication

#### `GET /api/v1/auth/login`

Initiates the Entra ID OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code + PKCE flow.

**Query parameters:**

| Param | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `slug` | Yes | The recipient slug from the email link |
| `redirect_uri` | No | Override post-auth destination (allowlisted) |

**Response:** `302` redirect to Entra ID authorization endpoint.

**State parameter** (HMAC-signed, Base64-encoded JSON):
```json
{
  "slug": "jane-doe-2024",
  "nonce": "<random 32 bytes>",
  "pkce_verifier": "<S256 code verifier>",
  "ts": 1735000000
}
```

---

#### `GET /api/v1/auth/callback`

Handles the OAuth callback from Entra ID.

**Query parameters:** `code`, `state` (as set above), `session_state`

**Logic:**
1. Validate `state` HMAC signature and timestamp (reject if > 5 minutes old).
2. Exchange `code` for `id_token` + `access_token` via MSAL token endpoint.
3. Validate `id_token`: signature, issuer, audience, nonce, expiry.
4. Extract `email` claim (falls back to `preferred_username`).
5. Look up recipient by `slug` from state.
6. If `email !== recipient.email` â†’ log denied attempt â†’ `302 /denied`.
7. Create Redis session â†’ set `__Host-farewell-session` cookie â†’ `302 /to/{slug}`.

**Error responses:**

| Scenario | Response |
|---|---|
| State HMAC invalid | `400 Bad Request` |
| State expired | `302 /auth/login?slug={slug}&reason=session_expired` |
| Token validation failed | `401 Unauthorized` |
| Email mismatch | `302 /denied?reason=identity_mismatch` |
| Recipient not found | `404 Not Found` |
| Recipient inactive | `403 Forbidden` |

---

#### `POST /api/v1/auth/logout`

**Auth:** Required  
**Body:** none  

Destroys the Redis session and clears the cookie.

**Response:** `204 No Content`

---

### Recipient Page

#### `GET /api/v1/pages/:slug`

**Auth:** Required (must be the page's intended recipient)  
**Guard:** `authorizeRecipient` middleware verifies `session.email === recipient.email`

Returns the full page data needed to render the farewell page.

**Response `200`:**
```json
{
  "recipient": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "displayName": "Jane Doe",
    "jobTitle": "Senior Software Engineer",
    "department": "Azure Core",
    "team": "Networking",
    "avatarUrl": "https://cdn.farewell.contoso.com/avatars/...",
    "hireDate": "2018-03-12",
    "lastDay": "2024-12-20",
    "tenureYears": 6.77
  },
  "page": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "personalizedMessage": "<p>Jane, your impact on this team...</p>",
    "theme": "midnight-blue",
    "showGuestbook": true,
    "showTimeline": true,
    "showPhotos": true,
    "showVideo": false
  },
  "timelineEvents": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "eventDate": "2018-03-12",
      "title": "Joined Azure Core",
      "description": "Started as SDE II...",
      "icon": "briefcase",
      "displayOrder": 1
    }
  ],
  "mediaAssets": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "assetType": "photo",
      "cdnUrl": "https://cdn.farewell.contoso.com/media/...",
      "thumbnailCdnUrl": "https://cdn.farewell.contoso.com/thumbs/...",
      "caption": "Team offsite 2023",
      "displayOrder": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### Guestbook

#### `GET /api/v1/pages/:slug/guestbook`

**Auth:** Required (any authenticated user, not just the recipient)  
**Query parameters:**

| Param | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `cursor` | â€” | Pagination cursor (opaque, base64) |
| `limit` | `20` | Max entries per page (max 50) |

**Response `200`:**
```json
{
  "entries": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "authorDisplayName": "John Smith",
      "authorAvatarUrl": "https://...",
      "message": "Jane, it was a privilege working with you!",
      "reactionEmoji": "đźŚź",
      "createdAt": "2024-12-15T10:30:00Z"
    }
  ],
  "nextCursor": "eyJpZCI6InV1aWQiLCJjcmVhdGVkQXQiOiIyMDI0..."}
}
```

**Note:** Author emails are never exposed in the API response.

---

#### `POST /api/v1/pages/:slug/guestbook`

**Auth:** Required (any authenticated user)  
**Rate limit:** 3 posts per user per page, 1 post per 30 seconds globally per session

**Request body:**
```json
{
  "message": "Jane, it was a privilege working with you!",
  "reactionEmoji": "đźŚź"
}
```

**Validation:**
- `message`: 10â€“2000 characters, plain text, HTML-stripped server-side
- `reactionEmoji`: optional, single emoji character only

**Response `201`:**
```json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "authorDisplayName": "John Smith",
  "authorAvatarUrl": "https://...",
  "message": "Jane, it was a privilege working with you!",
  "reactionEmoji": "đźŚź",
  "createdAt": "2024-12-15T10:30:00Z"
}
```

---

### Media

#### `POST /api/v1/admin/pages/:pageId/media/upload-token`

**Auth:** Admin only  
Generates a time-limited Azure Blob SAS token for direct client-to-blob upload.  
The client uses this token to upload directly to Azure Blob Storage â€” the API is never in the data path.

**Request body:**
```json
{
  "fileName": "team-photo.jpg",
  "mimeType": "image/jpeg",
  "fileSizeBytes": 4200000
}
```

**Response `200`:**
```json
{
  "uploadUrl": "https://farewellstorage.blob.core.windows.net/media/...?sv=...&sig=...&se=...",
  "blobName": "pages/{pageId}/media/{uuid}.jpg",
  "expiresAt": "2024-12-15T11:00:00Z"
}
```

After upload, the client calls `POST /api/v1/admin/pages/:pageId/media` to register the asset.

---

#### `POST /api/v1/admin/pages/:pageId/media`

**Auth:** Admin only  
Registers an already-uploaded blob as a media asset.

**Request body:**
```json
{
  "blobName": "pages/{pageId}/media/{uuid}.jpg",
  "assetType": "photo",
  "caption": "Team offsite 2023",
  "displayOrder": 3,
  "widthPx": 1920,
  "heightPx": 1080
}
```

**Response `201`:** Created media asset object.

---

### Admin â€” Recipients

#### `GET /api/v1/admin/recipients`

**Auth:** Admin  
**Query:** `?search=jane&page=1&limit=20&status=active`

Returns paginated list of recipients.

---

#### `POST /api/v1/admin/recipients`

**Auth:** Admin  
Creates a new recipient and (optionally) sends the invitation email.

**Request body:**
```json
{
  "email": "jane.doe@contoso.com",
  "displayName": "Jane Doe",
  "jobTitle": "Senior Software Engineer",
  "department": "Azure Core",
  "team": "Networking",
  "hireDate": "2018-03-12",
  "lastDay": "2024-12-20",
  "sendEmail": false
}
```

**Response `201`:** Recipient object with generated `slug` and `id`.

---

#### `PUT /api/v1/admin/recipients/:id`

**Auth:** Admin  
Full update (PATCH semantics accepted for partial updates).

---

#### `DELETE /api/v1/admin/recipients/:id`

**Auth:** Admin  
Soft-delete: sets `is_active = false`, does not purge data.

---

### Admin â€” Pages

#### `GET /api/v1/admin/pages/:recipientId`

Returns the full page configuration for editing.

---

#### `PUT /api/v1/admin/pages/:recipientId`

**Auth:** Admin  
Upserts page content.

**Request body:**
```json
{
  "personalizedMessage": "<p>Jane, your impact on this team...</p>",
  "theme": "midnight-blue",
  "showGuestbook": true,
  "showTimeline": true,
  "showPhotos": true,
  "showVideo": false
}
```

---

#### `POST /api/v1/admin/pages/:recipientId/publish`

**Auth:** Admin  
Sets `is_published = true` and records `published_at`.

---

#### `POST /api/v1/admin/pages/:recipientId/unpublish`

**Auth:** Admin  
Immediately revokes access to the page.

---

### Admin â€” Email

#### `POST /api/v1/admin/recipients/:id/send-email`

**Auth:** Admin  
Sends (or resends) the invitation email to the recipient via Azure Communication Services.

**Request body:**
```json
{
  "previewMode": false,
  "overrideEmail": null
}
```

- `previewMode: true` sends to the admin's own email for preview.
- `overrideEmail` sends to a specific address (for testing).

---

## Error Response Schema

All errors follow RFC 9457 (Problem Details for HTTP APIs):

```json
{
  "type": "https://farewell.contoso.com/errors/identity-mismatch",
  "title": "Identity Mismatch",
  "status": 403,
  "detail": "The authenticated identity does not match the intended recipient for this page.",
  "instance": "/api/v1/pages/jane-doe-2024",
  "traceId": "00-4bf92f3577b34da6a3ce929d0e0e4736-00f067aa0ba902b7-00"
}
```

---

## Rate Limiting

Enforced by `@fastify/rate-limit` backed by Redis:

| Endpoint group | Limit |
|---|---|
| `GET /api/v1/auth/login` | 10 req / 5 min per IP |
| `GET /api/v1/auth/callback` | 10 req / 5 min per IP |
| `POST /api/v1/.../guestbook` | 3 posts / page / user lifetime; 1 post / 30s per session |
| All admin endpoints | 200 req / min per admin account |
| All public read endpoints | 60 req / min per session |

Exceeded limits return `429 Too Many Requests` with `Retry-After` header.

---

## Pagination

Cursor-based pagination throughout (no offset pagination).

```json
{
  "data": [...],
  "pagination": {
    "nextCursor": "base64-opaque-cursor",
    "hasMore": true,
    "total": 47
  }
}
```

Cursors encode the sort key + last seen ID, are HMAC-signed, and expire after 1 hour.
